confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: SLM if score <= 0.0000; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.0000 < score < 0.0100; BASELINE otherwise.
confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: SLM if score <= 0.0000; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.0000 < score < 0.0100; BASELINE otherwise.

confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: SLM if score <= 0.3129; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.3129 < score < 0.3329; BASELINE otherwise.

confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: SLM if score <= 0.0559; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.0559 < score < 0.0900; BASELINE otherwise.
